design_philosophy: Bloomberg Terminal aesthetic: Exclusively dark mode, ultra-high data density, strictly functional, no decorative elements ('pas de déco'). Built for professionals to assess data center feasibility quickly. Desktop-first (1280px min).

rules: Use JetBrains Mono for ALL numbers, scores, coordinates, financial metrics, and table headers.
Never center text unless inside a specific geometric widget. Default to left-alignment for scanning.
Line heights must be tight (leading-none or leading-tight) to maximize vertical space.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Extremely tight. Use p-2, p-3, p-4 maximum for panels.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or maximum rounded-sm (2px) for interactive elements. NO soft corners.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: None. Flat UI. Use 1px borders and slight background color shifts (e.g., to #1a1a24) for elevation or hover states.
layout_and_spacing.panels: Layout should feel like a multi-pane window manager (Bloomberg terminal). Flex/Grid containers must fill viewport height (h-screen minus header).

cards_and_panels.header: Border-b border-[#1f1f2e] bg-[#0a0a0f] p-2 flex items-center justify-between

buttons.style: h-8 px-3 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none border transition-colors

tables.header: border-y border-[#1f1f2e] text-xs text-[#8f8f9d] uppercase tracking-wider bg-[#0a0a0f]

inputs.style: h-8 bg-[#0a0a0f] border border-[#1f1f2e] text-sm text-[#e8e8ed] rounded-none focus:border-[#00d4aa] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00d4aa]

badges.style: px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono uppercase tracking-wider border rounded-none

key_features_implementation.interactive_map: Use Leaflet. MUST use a dark tile layer (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter). Map should occupy at least 50% of the screen width in desktop view. Plot layers using the highly visible primary (#00d4aa) and secondary (#3b82f6) hex codes for markers and polygons.
key_features_implementation.technical_scoring: Use dense horizontal progress bars or simple numerical readouts (e.g., '85/100'). Color-code the score: <50 danger, 50-75 warning, >75 primary green.
key_features_implementation.financial_charts: Use Recharts for CAPEX/IRR. Remove standard Cartesian grids or make them extremely faint (#1f1f2e). Use straight lines (type='linear'), no curves. Use #00d4aa for positive cash flow, #ff4757 for costs.
key_features_implementation.crm_kanban: Dense column layout. Cards inside columns should be extremely compact (p-2), showing only Title, Score, MW capacity, and Status badge. No avatars or decorative icons.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Instant or very fast (duration-75). Bloomberg terminal users prefer speed over smooth, slow animations.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Keep it strictly to color changes or opacity. NO bouncing, scaling, or parallax.

media.rules: Absolutely no decorative images. The user explicitly requested 'pas de déco'.

login_background.description: Optional dark server room background for the login screen. Should be heavily overlayed with bg-[#0a0a0f]/90 to remain extremely subtle.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind with the exact hex codes provided in the 'colors' object. Map them to semantic names like 'dc-green' or 'infra-blue'.
Install and configure 'JetBrains Mono' for all numerical data and 'IBM Plex Sans' for standard text. Import them via Google Fonts.
Override default Shadcn components: Set all border-radius to 0 (`rounded-none`), reduce padding to make components denser (e.g., h-8 instead of h-10 for inputs).
Implement a resizable panel layout (like react-resizable-panels) if possible, to mimic a true trading/data terminal where users can adjust the map vs. data panel widths.
Ensure the application strictly enforces desktop-first styling. Hide complex data or show warning overlays on viewports below 1280px.
For the Leaflet map, disable default light mode tiles. You must use a dark theme URL (e.g., `https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png`).
